commands.name: ,lf setup
commands.desc: Set up an artist — creates category, forums, and syncs threads.

commands.name: ,lf set on/off
commands.desc: Enable or disable Local Files for this server.

commands.name: ,lf remove <artist>
commands.desc: Remove an artist's data from the bot.

commands.name: ,lf sync <artist>
commands.desc: Re-sync all threads for a specific artist.

commands.name: ,lf syncall
commands.desc: Re-sync all active artists at once.

commands.name: ,lf status
commands.desc: Show active artists, forum counts, and synced thread counts.

commands.name: ,lf addartist <id> <name>
commands.desc: Temporarily add a new artist with a Drive category ID.

commands.name: ,addsong #forum
commands.desc: Attach an MP3 or M4A file and post it as a forum thread.

commands.name: ,addsong | tag | #forum
commands.desc: Same as above but applies a forum tag to the thread.

commands.name: ,addsong | #forum | Drive/Path
commands.desc: Post all songs from a Google Drive folder path as threads.

commands.name: ,addsong | tag | #forum | Drive/Path
commands.desc: Same as above but applies a forum tag to every thread.

commands.name: ,addsong help
commands.desc: Show the full AddSong usage guide.

commands.name: ,autologger on <artist>
commands.desc: Enable automatic Drive sync for an artist. Scans every 5 minutes, creates forums per era, posts songs with MP3 + M4A download buttons.

commands.name: ,autologger off <artist>
commands.desc: Disable automatic syncing for an artist.

commands.name: ,artist remove <name>
commands.desc: Delete an artist's category and all channels inside it. Asks for confirmation first.

commands.name: ,artist log <name>
commands.desc: View the artist event log — songs posted, forums created, recent activity.

commands.name: ,drivesync
commands.desc: Fast scan — indexes Google Drive folder structure and file IDs.

commands.name: ,drivesync full
commands.desc: Full scan — downloads every file and reads full audio metadata: title, artist, album, year, duration, bitrate, cover art.
